message:
feat: add Agent Mail server detection and config (ntm-uwa)

- Add AgentMailConfig struct with URL, token, auto_register settings
- Support environment variable overrides (AGENT_MAIL_URL, AGENT_MAIL_TOKEN)
- Add Agent Mail status check to ntm deps command
- Integrate IsAvailable() with 2s timeout and 30s result caching
- Default server URL: http://127.0.0.1:8765/mcp/

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
